item.title: Israel has 'brought football into disrepute', says Fifa
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- FIFA’s inaction on football clubs based in Israeli settlements flouts international law: Amnesty
- FIFA fines Israel FA over discrimination breaches]]>

item.title: US to deploy thousands of additional troops to the Middle East, officials say

- US to deploy thousands of more troops to West Asia, say officials
- US to deploy thousands more troops to the Middle East

- U.S. Dispatches Marines and Warships to Middle East
- US to deploy thousands of additional troops to the Middle East

- US to deploy several thousand more troops to Middle East — Reuters
- Contingent of 2,500 US Marines to be deployed to Middle East in coming days — Axios
- US to deploy of thousands of additional troops to the Middle East, officials say
- US deploying thousands of Marines, sailors to Middle East as Iran war rages
- US to deploy of thousands of additional troops to the Middle East, officials say
- US accelerates deployment of additional troops to Middle East — TV channel]]>

item.title: Israeli military says it is striking Hezbollah targets in Beirut

Matched Titles:
- At least 20 killed in latest Israeli attacks on Lebanon
- Israeli air strikes target multiple towns in southern Lebanon
- Israel says it hit Syrian government targets after attacks on Druze civilians
- Israel hits more than 2,000 targets since beginning of campaign in Lebanon — IDF
- Hezbollah says it has launched 9 attacks on Israeli settlements since early Friday
- Israeli strikes kill 2 in southern Lebanon as jets break sound barrier over Beirut

- Hezbollah battles Israeli troops in Lebanon]]>

item.title: In pictures: Middle East celebrates Eid under the shadow of Iran war
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- From the Frontline: Eid without joy -- Lebanon's displaced mark holiday in war's shadows
- War-Weary Lebanon Marks Eid With Muted Celebration
- War-Weary Lebanon Marks Eid With Muted Celebration
- War and displacement mar the run-up to Eid al-Fitr holiday for many in Lebanon]]>
